human.title: Chamber temperature uniformity mapping
human.objective: Verify temperature uniformity across mapped locations at the target cycle temperature.
human.setup: Install calibrated thermocouples at supplier mapping points; use NIST traceable data logger; ensure chamber empty or use representative non-production load per protocol.
steps: Install thermocouples at all mapped locations identified in supplier mapping plan.
Run a representative sterilization cycle at the target temperature without product load or with representative load as specified.
Record temperature versus time at all mapped points throughout the cycle.
Compute plateau temperature and plateau duration for each mapped point.
human.dataToRecord: Time series for each thermocouple; maximum and minimum plateau temperatures; plateau durations; cycle log and setpoint trace.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All mapped points must be within ±2.0 °C of the setpoint during plateau and plateau duration must meet the dwell time requirement specified by the manufacturer or protocol.

human.title: Vacuum and leak performance test
human.objective: Verify vacuum pump performance, chamber leak rate, and pre‑vacuum cycle performance.
human.setup: Instrument vacuum gauge and leak test apparatus per supplier instructions; ensure vacuum pump warmed up and instrument calibration current.
steps: Execute a pre‑vacuum cycle and measure the vacuum level achieved.
Hold vacuum for the defined hold period and measure leak rate.
If applicable, perform helium leak detection per supplier guidance.
Record pump inlet/outlet parameters and any alarm events.
human.dataToRecord: Vacuum level traces, leak rate values, pump performance logs, helium leak detector readings if performed.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Vacuum level meets supplier specification and leak rate is below supplier threshold; pump performance within manufacturer tolerances.

human.title: Bowie‑Dick air removal test
human.objective: Verify air removal efficiency for pre‑vacuum sterilizers.
human.setup: Standardized Bowie‑Dick test pack per ISO 11140‑4; chamber empty except for test pack; thermocouples not required for this test.
steps: Run a Bowie‑Dick cycle using the standardized test pack.
Inspect the test pack result according to ISO 11140‑4 criteria and manufacturer instructions.
Document pass/fail and any deviations.
human.dataToRecord: Test pack result images, cycle log, and pass/fail determination.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Bowie‑Dick test indicates successful air removal per manufacturer and ISO 11140‑4 guidance.

human.title: Biological indicator placement and PQ runs
human.objective: Demonstrate microbial inactivation for worst‑case loads using biological indicators.
human.setup: Place biological indicators (BIs) at worst‑case locations identified in mapping; include positive and negative controls; follow BI manufacturer incubation instructions.
steps: Place BIs at designated worst‑case locations and run PQ cycle with worst‑case load.
Collect BIs and incubate per BI manufacturer instructions.
Record incubation results and repeat for required consecutive PQ cycles.
human.dataToRecord: BI incubation results, cycle logs, load maps, and BI lot numbers.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All biological indicators show no growth after incubation per BI manufacturer instructions and OQ parameters met for each PQ run.

human.title: Steam quality and condensate verification
human.objective: Verify steam dryness, condensate management, and absence of wet steam that could affect sterilization.
human.setup: Install steam quality measurement instruments (e.g., dryness fraction meter) and inspect condensate traps and steam traps per supplier guidance.
steps: Measure steam dryness fraction and record values across representative cycles.
Inspect and test condensate traps and steam traps for correct operation.
Document any condensate carryover or wet steam indicators.
human.dataToRecord: Steam dryness fraction readings, condensate trap inspection logs, and cycle conditions.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Steam dryness and condensate control meet supplier specifications and applicable standards; no evidence of wet steam during cycles.

human.title: Control system and alarm verification
human.objective: Verify control system logic, alarm thresholds, and alarm notification behavior.
human.setup: Access to PLC/controls, alarm logs, and test user accounts; test environment or safe mode for alarm injection.
steps: Review control logic and alarm configuration against supplier documentation.
Simulate alarm conditions and verify alarm generation, logging, and notification.
Verify alarm thresholds and that alarms trigger required operator actions.
human.dataToRecord: Alarm logs, screenshots of alarm events, control logic snapshots, and test results.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Alarms generate as configured, are logged with timestamp and user, and notifications reach intended recipients; control logic matches documented behavior.

human.title: EtO concentration and humidity verification
human.objective: Verify EtO gas concentration and chamber humidity meet validated process parameters.
human.setup: Install calibrated EtO concentration sensors and humidity probes; ensure calibration certificates available.
steps: Run representative EtO cycle and record EtO concentration and humidity profiles.
Compare measured profiles to validated setpoints and acceptance ranges.
Document any excursions and corrective actions.
human.dataToRecord: EtO concentration time series, humidity traces, cycle logs, and sensor calibration certificates.
human.acceptanceCriteria: EtO concentration and humidity remain within validated limits for the required dwell period.

human.title: Dwell time verification
human.objective: Confirm that the sterilization dwell time at target conditions meets validated requirements.
human.setup: Use cycle logs and validated sensors to measure time at setpoint; ensure time synchronization across instruments.
steps: Run representative cycle and record time at target temperature/conditions.
Verify dwell time meets or exceeds validated requirement for product geometry.
Document cycle logs and any deviations.
human.dataToRecord: Cycle time traces, time-at-temperature calculations, and acceptance comparison.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Dwell time at target conditions meets validated requirement for the product and load configuration.

human.title: Aeration performance test
human.objective: Verify aeration removes residual sterilant to acceptable levels for the product.
human.setup: Use validated residual testing methods and sample product per protocol; ensure aeration equipment and monitoring in place.
steps: Run aeration cycle per validated procedure.
Collect product samples and perform residual testing per method.
Compare residual levels to acceptance criteria.
human.dataToRecord: Residual test results, aeration cycle logs, and sample identifiers.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Residual sterilant levels are below specified acceptance limits for the product type.

human.title: Pump flow accuracy verification
human.objective: Verify pump flow rate accuracy across the operational envelope.
human.setup: Use calibrated flow meters or gravimetric methods; set pump to representative flow setpoints.
steps: Set pump to low, mid, and high flow setpoints and measure delivered flow.
Record measured versus setpoint values and compute percent error.
Repeat measurements per protocol and average results.
human.dataToRecord: Measured flow values, setpoints, percent error calculations, and calibration certificates.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Measured flow is within supplier or method specified tolerance across the tested envelope.

human.title: Wavelength accuracy verification
human.objective: Verify spectrophotometer wavelength accuracy and calibration.
human.setup: Use certified wavelength standards (holmium oxide, didymium) and follow instrument vendor procedures.
steps: Run wavelength calibration standards and record measured peak positions.
Compare measured peaks to certified values and compute deviations.
Document calibration certificate and any adjustments.
human.dataToRecord: Standard spectra, measured peak positions, deviation calculations, and calibration certificates.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Wavelength deviations are within instrument and method specified tolerances.

human.title: System suitability verification
human.objective: Confirm analytical system performance meets method suitability criteria prior to sample analysis.
human.setup: Prepare system suitability standard per method and ensure instrument warm‑up and equilibration.
steps: Inject system suitability standard and record chromatographic parameters (e.g., resolution, tailing, theoretical plates).
Compare measured parameters to method acceptance criteria.
Document results and proceed only if criteria met.
human.dataToRecord: Chromatograms, calculated system suitability metrics, and pass/fail determination.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All system suitability metrics meet method acceptance criteria.

human.title: Autosampler performance verification
human.objective: Verify autosampler precision, carryover, and injection accuracy.
human.setup: Use calibration standards and carryover test solutions; ensure autosampler syringes and vials are appropriate.
steps: Perform repeated injections of a standard to assess precision.
Run carryover sequence (high standard followed by blank) and measure carryover.
Verify injection volumes and retention time stability.
human.dataToRecord: Injection sequence logs, precision statistics, carryover measurements, and chromatograms.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Autosampler precision and carryover meet method and supplier acceptance criteria.

human.title: HEPA installation verification
human.objective: Confirm HEPA filters are installed correctly and plenum sealing is intact.
human.setup: Access to HEPA bank, filter serials, and installation records; particle counter and integrity test equipment.
steps: Inspect filter frames and gaskets for correct installation.
Perform filter integrity test (DOP/PAO or equivalent) per standard.
Record filter serial numbers and test results.
human.dataToRecord: Filter serials, integrity test results, and inspection photos.
human.acceptanceCriteria: No leaks detected; filter installation meets supplier and standard requirements.

human.title: Airflow and pressure differential verification
human.objective: Verify airflow rates and pressure differentials between zones meet design and cleanroom classification requirements.
human.setup: Calibrated anemometer, differential pressure gauge, and access to zone boundaries.
steps: Measure supply and return airflow rates at representative diffusers.
Measure pressure differentials between adjacent zones and to ambient.
Compare measurements to design and ISO 14644 classification requirements.
human.dataToRecord: Airflow readings, pressure differential logs, and measurement locations.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Airflow and pressure differentials meet design specifications and maintain required cascade for cleanroom classification.

human.title: HEPA filter leak test
human.objective: Detect leaks in HEPA filters and plenums using aerosol challenge.
human.setup: DOP/PAO aerosol generator, photometer, and access to filter face and plenum.
steps: Challenge HEPA filter with aerosol per standard method.
Scan filter face and plenum for leaks using photometer.
Document any leak locations and remedial actions.
human.dataToRecord: Photometer readings, leak locations, and test conditions.
human.acceptanceCriteria: No leaks above allowable threshold per standard.

human.title: Operational particle mapping (ISO 14644-1)
human.objective: Demonstrate particle counts under operational conditions meet ISO classification.
human.setup: Calibrated particle counter, representative operational load and personnel, and defined sampling locations.
steps: Run representative operations and sample particle counts at defined locations and heights.
Record particle counts for required size channels and durations.
Compare results to ISO 14644-1 limits for the target cleanroom class.
human.dataToRecord: Particle count logs, sampling locations, operational description, and environmental conditions.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Particle counts meet ISO 14644-1 limits for the specified cleanroom class.

match.testId: WFI loop integrity and conductivity verification

human.title: WFI loop integrity and conductivity verification
human.objective: Verify WFI distribution loop integrity and water conductivity meet pharmacopeial limits.
human.setup: Calibrated conductivity meter, sample ports, and access to WFI loop documentation.
steps: Collect conductivity samples at representative points in the WFI loop.
Perform loop integrity checks and inspect for dead legs or bypasses.
Document sample results and any corrective actions.
human.dataToRecord: Conductivity readings, sample locations, and loop inspection notes.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Conductivity and loop integrity meet pharmacopeial and site specifications.

match.testId: WFI distribution loop microbial challenge and recovery

human.title: WFI distribution loop microbial challenge and recovery
human.objective: Demonstrate WFI loop can recover to acceptable microbial levels after challenge.
human.setup: Microbiological challenge materials, sampling plan, and validated test methods.
steps: Introduce controlled microbial challenge per protocol and operate loop.
Collect samples at defined intervals and perform microbial enumeration.
Assess recovery and time to acceptable microbial levels.
human.dataToRecord: Microbial counts over time, sample IDs, and challenge conditions.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Microbial counts return to acceptable levels within defined recovery time per protocol.

match.testId: vacuum pump performance and leak test

human.title: Vacuum pump performance and leak test
human.objective: Verify vacuum pump performance and system leak rate under operational conditions.
human.setup: Calibrated vacuum gauges, leak test apparatus, and pump performance logs.
steps: Measure pump vacuum level and throughput under representative load.
Perform leak test and record leak rate.
Compare pump performance to supplier specifications.
human.dataToRecord: Pump performance logs, vacuum traces, and leak rate values.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Pump performance and leak rate meet supplier and site acceptance criteria.

match.testId: instrument air dew point and particle verification

human.title: Instrument air dew point and particle verification
human.objective: Verify instrument/compressed air meets dew point and particulate quality requirements.
human.setup: Dew point meter, particle counter, and sample points downstream of dryers and filters.
steps: Measure dew point and particle counts at representative points under load.
Record results and compare to ISO 8573 or site specifications.
Document filter and dryer maintenance status.
human.dataToRecord: Dew point readings, particle counts, and sample locations.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Dew point and particle counts meet specified class for instrument air.

match.testId: air quality verification under operational load

human.title: Air quality verification under operational load
human.objective: Confirm air quality (particles, dew point, oil) remains acceptable during production.
human.setup: Particle counter, dew point meter, oil vapor detector, and representative production conditions.
steps: Run production under representative load and sample air quality at critical points.
Record particle counts, dew point, and oil content.
Compare results to acceptance criteria and document deviations.
human.dataToRecord: Particle counts, dew point, oil measurements, and operational context.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Air quality parameters meet site and supplier acceptance criteria during operational load.

human.title: Seal strength and temperature profiling
human.objective: Verify sealer temperature profile and resulting seal strength across materials and speeds.
human.setup: Seal strength tester, temperature profiler, and representative film/material samples.
steps: Run sealer across representative speeds and materials while recording temperature profile.
Collect sealed samples and perform seal strength tests.
Compare seal strength to supplier and method acceptance criteria.
human.dataToRecord: Temperature profiles, seal strength measurements, and sample identifiers.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Seal strength meets acceptance criteria across tested materials and speeds.

human.title: Vision inspection system calibration
human.objective: Verify vision system lighting, focus, and algorithm thresholds produce reliable defect detection.
human.setup: Calibration targets, representative product samples, and access to algorithm configuration.
steps: Calibrate lighting and focus using standard targets.
Run known good and known bad samples to verify detection sensitivity and false positive rate.
Adjust algorithm thresholds as required and document settings.
human.dataToRecord: Calibration images, detection statistics, and algorithm configuration snapshots.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Vision system detects defects within acceptable sensitivity and false positive limits.

match.testId: filler dosing accuracy across operational envelope

human.title: Filler dosing accuracy verification
human.objective: Verify filler dosing accuracy across low, medium, and high flow conditions.
human.setup: Calibrated balance or flow meter, representative product, and sampling plan.
steps: Run filler at low, mid, and high setpoints and collect samples.
Weigh or measure dispensed volumes and compute percent error.
Compare results to supplier and method tolerances.
human.dataToRecord: Measured volumes/weights, setpoints, percent error calculations, and sample IDs.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Dosing accuracy within specified tolerance across operational envelope.

human.title: In-line checkweigher verification
human.objective: Verify checkweigher accuracy, repeatability, and rejection logic.
human.setup: Calibrated weights, checkweigher calibration records, and representative product flow.
steps: Run calibration sequence with known weights and verify measured values.
Test rejection logic with underweight and overweight samples.
Document calibration and test results.
human.dataToRecord: Calibration logs, measured weights, rejection events, and test conditions.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Checkweigher accuracy and rejection logic meet supplier and site acceptance criteria.

human.title: Method system suitability verification
human.objective: Confirm the analytical method and system meet suitability criteria for the intended test.
human.setup: Prepare method-specific system suitability standards and follow method SOP.
steps: Run system suitability standard and calculate method-specific metrics (e.g., resolution, RSD, recovery).
Compare metrics to method acceptance criteria.
Document results and proceed with sample testing only if criteria met.
human.dataToRecord: Chromatograms, calculated metrics, and pass/fail determination.
human.acceptanceCriteria: All method-specific system suitability metrics meet acceptance criteria.

human.title: CSV/export integrity verification
human.objective: Verify that cycle data exported from HMI is complete, unaltered, and readable; checksums or hash verification where applicable.
human.setup: Access to HMI export function; SHA256 or equivalent checksum tool if applicable; test cycle data.
steps: Export cycle data from HMI to file (CSV or equivalent) per procedure.
Verify file is readable and contains expected fields (cycle ID, temperature, pressure, time, etc.).
If applicable, compute checksum (e.g., SHA256) and document for tamper verification.
human.dataToRecord: Export file, checksum if performed, field verification checklist.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Export completes successfully; file structure and content match expected format; checksum documented.

human.title: Printout versus export data match
human.objective: Verify that printed cycle data matches exported electronic data; no transcription or truncation errors.
human.setup: Run representative cycle; obtain both printed output and electronic export.
steps: Run sterilization cycle and collect printed cycle record.
Export cycle data to file per procedure.
Compare printed record to exported data for key parameters (cycle ID, temperatures, times, pass/fail).
Document any discrepancies.
human.dataToRecord: Printed record scan, export file, comparison checklist, discrepancy log.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Printed record and export match for all critical parameters; no unauthorized differences.

human.title: Backup and restore verification
human.objective: Verify that cycle data can be backed up and restored without loss or alteration.
human.setup: Backup/restore procedure; test dataset; backup media.
steps: Execute backup procedure per documented SOP.
Perform controlled restore to test environment.
Compare restored data to original for integrity and completeness.
Document backup/restore logs and verification results.
human.dataToRecord: Backup logs, restore logs, data comparison results.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Backup completes successfully; restored data matches original; procedure documented and repeatable.

human.title: HMI functions and cycle data export verification
human.objective: Verify HMI cycle run, display, and data export functions operate correctly.
human.setup: Access to HMI; ability to run non-product cycle; export and printout capability.
steps: Run representative cycle and verify HMI displays cycle parameters in real time.
Verify cycle completion and pass/fail status display.
Export cycle data to file and verify export completes.
Obtain printout and verify content matches display.
human.dataToRecord: Cycle log, export file, printout, verification checklist.
human.acceptanceCriteria: HMI displays cycle correctly; export and printout produce accurate, complete records.

human.title: Audit trail integrity test
human.objective: Verify that the computerized data system records immutable audit trails and that audit trails cannot be altered without detection.
human.setup: Access to CDS with test user accounts and audit trail viewer; test dataset and controlled actions prepared.
steps: Perform a sequence of controlled actions (create, modify, delete) using test accounts.
Verify audit trail entries record user, timestamp, and action.
Attempt an authorized and an unauthorized modification and verify detection mechanisms.
human.dataToRecord: Audit trail entries, screenshots, user account logs, and test action records.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Audit trail records all actions with user and timestamp; unauthorized modifications are detected and logged.

human.title: {{testId}}
human.objective: Execute the supplier recommended verification for {{testId}}.
human.setup: Follow supplier documentation and applicable standards.
steps: Execute supplier recommended procedure for {{testId}}.
human.dataToRecord: Supplier report and measured values.
human.acceptanceCriteria: Meet supplier acceptance criteria or applicable standard.
